exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Consolidated BS 12/31/24 and 12/31/23; consolidated IS, members' equity, cash flows for FY2024, FY2023, FY2022. Ernst & Young LLP Chicago, unmodified opinion dated March 14, 2025.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement (Traditional)
exhibits.notes: Primary form. Governs 20-yr traditional restaurant franchises.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement (Satellite)
exhibits.notes: Satellite variant — term varies by location.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement (Walmart)
exhibits.notes: MIW (McDonald's in Walmart) variant — Fixed Percentage Rent 14%–15.5%.

exhibits.name: BFL Rider
exhibits.notes: Business Facilities Lease rider; 3-yr term with conditional 20-yr extension option.

exhibits.name: Operator's Lease
exhibits.notes: Standard commercial lease; franchisee pays rent + property taxes + insurance + maintenance + structural repairs.

exhibits.name: Candidate Agreements (Preliminary Agreement)
exhibits.notes: Must be signed before training program. No employment relationship; no compensation; franchisor may remove candidate at will.

exhibits.name: McDonald's New Term Policy
exhibits.notes: Discretionary policy, NOT a contract right. Percentage Rent floor for new-term franchises is current rate (but at least 8.50%).

exhibits.name: McDonald's Growth Policy
exhibits.notes: Governs acquisition of additional franchises; no contract right to additional franchises.

exhibits.name: Loan and Related Documents
exhibits.notes: BOA promissory note, security agreement, ACH authorization, Operator Assistance Program Agreement (waives claims against McDonald's).

exhibits.name: List of Agents for Service of Process
McDonald's Affiliates
exhibits.notes: International affiliates offering McDonald's franchises outside U.S.

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Restaurants
exhibits.notes: Full U.S. franchised list as of 12/31/2024.

exhibits.name: List of Departed Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 113 franchisees whose restaurants were terminated, canceled, not renewed, or voluntarily/involuntarily ceased during the most recent completed fiscal year, or who have not communicated within 10 weeks of the application date.

exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: State-by-state modifications to Franchise Agreement; not decoded in this pass (content gated behind Exhibit T header).

catalog_notes: Exhibit positions are inferred from the TOC (pages 7–8 of PDF). Full page boundaries not individually verified for exhibits beyond A. No exhibit decoding was performed beyond Exhibit A (Item 21 supporting financial statements).
